content:
Igbohunsafẹfẹ asopọ-ipele akọkọ ti dexmedetomidine nigba yipada lati propofol ni a ṣe iṣiro nipa lilo iwọn lilo propofol lọwọlọwọ, pẹlu ilana atẹle meji:

1. Ṣe iṣiro iwọn lilo propofol lọwọlọwọ ni mcg/kg/min.
2. Lo ipin iyipada boṣewa: fun apẹẹrẹ, fun gbogbo 10 mcg/kg/min ti propofol, bẹrẹ dexmedetomidine ni 0.7 mcg/kg/ wakati.

Ilana yii n jẹ ki a ṣe iyipada laiyara ati aabo laarin awọn sedatives meji.
